nodes.label: Queue-Based GIF/WebP Frame Transfer
nodes.rationale: Reduce duplicate frame copying and memory churn during animated preview streaming.

nodes.label: 300-Frame Limit and 30 FPS Ceiling
nodes.rationale: Stabilize CPU usage by capping streamed animation work and timing.

nodes.label: Confirm File Type Option
nodes.rationale: Handle mislabeled image extensions by validating file headers before decoding.

nodes.label: Explorer Folder Cache Optimization
nodes.rationale: Reduce repeated directory lookups while resolving hovered media files.

nodes.label: Post-Folder-Navigation Input Gate
nodes.rationale: Prevent stale keyboard state from triggering unwanted previews after folder changes.
